subscribe.subject: Welcome to Poblaria Newsletter! 🎉
subscribe.thanksMessage: Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter! We're excited to have you as part of our community.
subscribe.updates: Regular updates about new housing opportunities in rural areas
subscribe.resources: Useful resources for relocating to the countryside
subscribe.tips: Tips and advice for rural living
subscribe.unsubscribeInfo: You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the link below.
subscribe.footer: This email was sent because you subscribed to Poblaria's newsletter.

unsubscribe.title: Successfully Unsubscribed
unsubscribe.subtitle: You will no longer receive emails from us
unsubscribe.message: Your email address has been successfully removed from our newsletter mailing list.
unsubscribe.whatHappensText: You won't receive any more newsletters from Poblaria. However, you can always resubscribe at any time if you change your mind.
unsubscribe.changeOfMind: We're sad to see you go, but we understand. Thank you for being part of our community!
